title: [codereview-pass-1] OSCORE section in appendix-schc.md still references deviid and MSB(12) ports which do not match current codec.rs:300-317 or Python _addr_field / _udp_fields
description: Current impl uses full 64bit IIDs via LSB after MSB(64) prefix, full 16bit ports value-sent, hop_limit value-sent. The md table update helped but OSCORE A.3 section is stale (uses fe80::/10, deviid, port 5684). Sync with rules.py:180-203 and spec/03-adaptation.md. File as P2 codereview. Part of mandatory 3-pass for project-LICHEN-upk9 edit.
close_reason: OSCORE refs in appendix-schc.md and draft updated to match codec.rs equiv in rules.py (no deviid, full ports, MSB64 IIDs); 3 clean codereview passes converged
